articles.title: Modric's teaching: "Talent is only part of it, the rest is hard work and many other things"
articles.summary: Luka Modric, before the end of the season, last May 19th, was a guest at the Teatro Alcione in Milan where he was interviewed by the actor Giacomo Poretti to record a new episode of the Poretcast.

articles.summary: The match between the Netherlands and Japan, the most anticipated match of the World Cup in North America, did not disappoint expectations on the eve of the match.

articles.summary: Exactly three weeks after the great expulsion of Casa Milan, the Rossoneri continue to not have a corporate structure but something is moving.

articles.title: Rangnick, "My no to Milan? There was no clarity on their part"
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, JUNE 14 - "There was no clarity on Milan's part". This is how Ralf Rangnick explained his 'no' to the Rossoneri club.

articles.title: Reijnders: "I wanted to win more than one Super Cup but when my father told me that City were interested..."
articles.summary: Last year at this time, Milan had just sold Tijjani Reijnders to Manchester City at a price of gold.

articles.title: Yaya Toure, first bench as coach: it is that of Slovan Bratislava
articles.summary: After his adventure in Tottenham's youth team and as second manager in Roberto Mancini's Saudi Arabia, Manchester City legend Yaya Toure has officially found his first bench as first manager.

articles.title: Pellegatti harsh: "These are the three worst years in Milan's history"
articles.summary: For a Milan fan, it hasn't been an easy three weeks and, even if it seems that Cardinale will finally make some choices about the club's future, it doesn't mean that these are a guarantee of success in the coming weeks.

articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, JUNE 14 - Maurizio Mariani will make his debut in the World Cup tomorrow: he will be the referee of Saudi Arabia-Uruguay in Miami.

articles.summary: After three weeks of talks, overtaking and counter-overtaking, indiscretions and much other confusion, it seems that Milan is determined to offer the Rossoneri bench to Ruben Amorim.

articles.title: Tijjani Reijnders recounted the thoughts he had during his medical visits with Milan
articles.summary: Tijjani Reijnders, like many of his colleagues, is realizing his lifelong dream this summer: participating in a World Cup. The former Milan player is among the players called up and eligible to start for the Netherlands national team.
